---
name: Error / Broken Content
about: Report a typo, broken link, wrong code, or factual error
title: "[ERROR] "
labels: bug
---

**Where's the issue?**
File path + line number (e.g., `Kafka/kafka-deep-dive-part-3.md:42`)

**What's wrong?**
Describe the error or the confusing part.

**Suggested fix (optional)**
If you know the correction, paste it here.
